appliedUpdates.description: Documented that terminal-surface validators should fall back to `bunx tuistory` when `tuistory` is not on PATH.

executionNotes: Validated the browser surface with an agent-browser flow validator against the demo study overview and runs pages on localhost:5180.
Validated the remaining end-to-end and cross-area assertions with serialized test-cli flow validators using targeted Vitest suites and the deployed Convex environment variable lookup.
